scenarios.title: 카페 주문
scenarios.context: You are ordering a drink at a coffee shop. The barista greets you at the counter.

scenarios.title: 호텔 체크인
scenarios.context: You arrive at a hotel front desk to check in for your stay.

scenarios.title: 식당 주문
scenarios.context: You are at a restaurant and the server comes to take your order.

scenarios.title: 길 찾기
scenarios.context: You are lost in a new city and ask a friendly local for directions to the station.

scenarios.title: 옷 쇼핑
scenarios.context: You are shopping for clothes and a store assistant offers to help you.

scenarios.title: 전화 예약
scenarios.context: You are calling a clinic to make an appointment with the receptionist.

scenarios.title: 공항 체크인
scenarios.context: You are at the airport check-in counter for an international flight.

scenarios.title: 비즈니스 미팅
scenarios.context: You are introducing yourself at the start of a business meeting with a new partner.

scenarios.title: 병원 진료
scenarios.context: You are describing your symptoms to a doctor during a medical visit.

scenarios.title: 면접
scenarios.context: You are in a job interview and the interviewer asks about your background.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Hi there! What can I get for you today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I would like a latte, please.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Sure. What size would you like?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: A large one, please.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Great. Anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: No, that is all. Thank you.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Perfect. It will be ready in a moment.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Good evening! Welcome. Do you have a reservation?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Yes, I have a reservation under the name Park.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Let me check. May I see your passport, please?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Here it is.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Thank you. You are in room 502 on the fifth floor.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Could you tell me what time breakfast is served?

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Breakfast is from seven to ten in the main restaurant.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Good evening. Are you ready to order?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Yes, I will have the grilled salmon, please.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Excellent choice. Would you like soup or salad with that?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I will have the salad, please.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: And something to drink?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Just water for now, thank you.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: You look a little lost. Can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Yes, how do I get to the train station?

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Go straight for two blocks, then turn left.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Is it far from here?

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: No, it is about a five minute walk.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Thank you so much for your help.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: You are welcome. Have a good day!

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Hello! Are you looking for anything in particular?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Yes, I am looking for a winter jacket.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Of course. What size do you wear?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I usually wear a medium.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Here is one in medium. Would you like to try it on?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Yes, where is the fitting room?

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: It is right over there, on your left.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Good morning, Sunrise Clinic. How may I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Hello, I would like to make an appointment.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Certainly. What day works best for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Would Thursday afternoon be possible?

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Yes, we have an opening at three o'clock.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: That works for me. Thank you.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Good morning. May I see your passport and ticket?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Sure, here you are.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Are you checking any bags today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Yes, I have one suitcase to check in.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Please place it on the scale. Would you like a window seat?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: A window seat would be great, thank you.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: All set. Your gate is 23, boarding at ten thirty.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Welcome. It is a pleasure to finally meet you in person.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Thank you. I have been looking forward to this meeting.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Shall we start by reviewing the proposal?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: Yes, let us begin with the budget section.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Sounds good. Do you have any initial concerns?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I would like to discuss the timeline in more detail.
turns.hint_ko: 일정에 대해 좀 더 자세히 논의하고 싶습니다.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Of course. Let me walk you through our schedule.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Hello. What seems to be the problem today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I have had a sore throat and a fever since yesterday.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: I see. Have you taken any medicine for it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I took some painkillers, but they did not help much.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Let me examine you. Please open your mouth and say ah.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: How long will it take to recover?

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: With rest and medication, you should feel better in a few days.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Thanks for coming in. Could you tell me about yourself?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I have five years of experience in marketing.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Impressive. Why are you interested in this position?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I am drawn to your company's focus on innovation.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: What would you say is your greatest strength?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text_en: I am very good at solving problems under pressure.
turns.hint_ko: 저는 압박 속에서 문제를 해결하는 데 능숙합니다.

turns.speaker: ted
turns.text_en: Great. Do you have any questions for us?
